auth.sign_in_to_access: Sign in to access your medical hub
auth.username_hint: Letters, numbers, and underscores. Minimum 3 characters.
auth.email_hint: Optional. Required for password recovery and cloud sync.
auth.terms_notice: By signing in, you agree to our
auth.reset_email_sent: Reset email sent! Check your inbox.
auth.forgot_password_description: Enter your email to receive a reset link.

errors.username_min_length: Username must be at least 3 characters
errors.username_invalid: Username must contain only letters, numbers, and underscores
errors.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.email_required: Email is required for password recovery
errors.terms_required: You must accept the terms to continue
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

offline.title: You are offline
offline.login_message: You can sign in with your locally saved credentials.
offline.register_message: Your account will be created locally and synced when back online.
offline.info_description: Darwin MFC works offline for up to 7 days after your last login. Your data is securely saved locally.
